title: Leaderboards
subtitle: Global standings across every Chesser account that opted in.

join.title: Join the leaderboards
join.signedIn: Leaderboards are opt-in. Joining shares your display name and your ratings/Puzzle Rush best on the public boards — nothing else.
join.signedOut: Sign in (top right) and opt in to compete. Only your display name and scores are ever shown.

error: Couldn't reach the leaderboard server. Try refreshing.

empty.weekly: Nobody has posted a score this week — be the first!
empty.global: No entries yet — be the first!

hint.rush: Finish a Puzzle Rush run and your best lands here automatically.
hint.other: Play a rated game or puzzle (and let it sync) to enter this board.

footer: Scores are checked server-side against your synced progress — see your Profile tab to manage what you share.
